error.duplicate_zone_name: Zone name already exists on this floor
error.insufficient_vertices: Zone must have at least 3 vertices
error.invalid_target_count: Device must have exactly 6 target entities (3 targets with X and Y coordinates)

error.no_target_entities: No target entities found on selected device. Ensure the device has target coordinate sensors.

add_block_zone.description:
Create a block zone to filter out false detections. Provide vertices as [[x,y], [x,y], ...]

Example: {vertices_example}
add_block_zone.title: Add Block Zone

data_description.device_id: Select the ESPHome device with LD2450 sensor
data_description.position_x: X coordinate of sensor in millimeters
data_description.position_y: Y coordinate of sensor in millimeters
data_description.sensor_name: Optional name for the sensor (e.g., 'Living Room', 'Bedroom')

add_sensor.description: Add an ESPHome LD2450 sensor to the fusion system. The integration will automatically detect target entities from the selected device.
add_sensor.title: Add Sensor

add_zone.description:
Create a detection zone. Provide vertices as [[x,y], [x,y], ...] or space-separated pairs.

Example: {vertices_example}
add_zone.title: Add Zone

edit_block_zone_form.description:
Edit the block zone. Targets within this zone will be filtered out when enabled. Provide vertices as [[x,y], [x,y], ...] or space-separated pairs.

Example: {vertices_example}
